title: Irani Rael
content:
{{Otheruses|Nova Prime}} {{CharHub|Irani Rael|Irani Rael}} {{Character |image = Irani.jpg |real name = Irani Rael |species = [[Xandarian]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|NOV}} |gender = Female |title = {{Military Rank|NC-5}} |affiliation = {{Affiliation|NOVA}} |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'' ([[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted scene]]) |comic = {{Infobox List|''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 Prelude]]''
{{Collapse|''[[Avengers: Infinity War Prelude]]'' (flashbacks)}}}} |actor = [[Glenn Close]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|[[Ronan the Accuser|He]] is slaughtering children, families!"
"That is your business. Now I have other matters to attend to.|Irani Rael and [[Kree Ambassador]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Nova Prime '''Irani Rael''' is the commander of the [[Nova Corps]]. She led her people to victory with the help of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] when [[Ronan the Accuser]] attempted to destroy her home planet of [[Xandar]] with the [[Power Stone]]. ==Biography== ===Nova Prime=== ====Ending the War==== Irani Rael joined the [[Nova Corps]] and rose through its ranks, becoming the Nova Prime, the highest-ranked member, as well as the leader of the Corps. During her time as the Nova Prime, Rael dedicated much of her time to ending generations of bloodshed between the [[Kree]] and the [[Xandarians]]. Eventually, a peace treaty was signed ending the [[Kree-Nova War|thousand-year war]] between them.{{Ref|GotG}} ===Ronan's Conflict=== ====Keeping the Peace==== [[File:Irani-Rael-HeIsSlaughteringChildren.png|{{AltFloat}}|Rael speaks with a [[Kree Ambassador]]]] {{Quote|[[Ronan the Accuser|Ronan]] is destroying [[Xandar]]ian outposts throughout the galaxy. I should think that would call for some slight response on the part of the [[Kree]]."
"We signed your peace treaty, Nova Prime. What more do you want?|Irani Rael and [[Kree Ambassador]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Despite the treaty, [[Ronan the Accuser]], a [[Kree]] warrior who was disgusted by the treaty signed by the [[Kree Empire]] and the [[Nova Empire]] which signaled an end to the [[Kree-Nova War]], continued massacring [[Xandarian]] outposts across the galaxy, slaughtering children and families in the process. As a response, Rael appealed to the [[Kree Ambassador]], urging a response from the Kree Empire that condemned those horrific actions. [[File:Saal, Assistant and Prime.png|{{AltFloat}}|Rael learns that the [[Nova Corps]] apprehended [[Gamora]]]] However, the ambassador refused to condemn Ronan's war atrocities against Xandarians, saying that it was her business and he had more pressing matters to attend to. As the Ambassador ended the meeting, Rael cursed at him as [[Garthan Saal]] then approached her and informed her and other Nova officers that they had recently arrested one of Ronan's comrades, [[Gamora]], as well as [[Star-Lord|three]] [[Rocket|other]] [[Groot|outlaws]].{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Battle of Xandar]]==== [[File:NovaprimeIraniRael.png|{{AltFloat}}|Rael speaks to [[Rhomann Dey]]]] {{Quote|All Nova pilots, interlock and form a blockade. The [[Dark Aster]] must not reach the ground.|Irani Rael|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Several days later, the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] and the [[Yondu Ravager Clan]] arrived on [[Xandar]], after having [[Escape from the Kyln|escaped from the Kyln]]. [[Peter Quill]] informed the [[Nova Corps]] that [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s fleet was on its way with the [[Power Stone]] which could destroy the entire planet; Quill contacted [[Rhomann Dey]] and requested their help in defending Xandar. [[File:Guardians Of The Galaxy FBA2027 comp v038.1088.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Rael decides to trust the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]]] At the [[Nova Corps Headquarters]], Rael was approached by [[Rhomann Dey]], who informed her of [[Star-Lord]]'s request to help them in fighting [[Ronan the Accuser]] to prevent his plan to destroy [[Xandar]] with the [[Power Stone]]. While [[Garthan Saal]] insisted that they were tricking them because of their criminal pasts, Rael asked Dey if he trusted Quill's warning and offer to help them, to which he responded that he did. Rael reluctantly agreed to trust them and ordered an evacuation of the city. Rael then ordered [[Garthan Saal]] to lead the Xandarian fleet in a counterattack against Ronan's army. [[File:Nova-Prime-watches-Battle-of-Xandar.png|{{AltFloat}}|Rael watches over the [[Battle of Xandar]]]] A great [[Battle of Xandar|battle]] took place over Xandar. Rael knew their priority had to be to keep Ronan from landing [[Dark Aster|his ship]] and unleashing the [[Orb]]'s power upon the planet; to stop this, she ordered Saal and the fleet to form a blockade to slow Ronan's path while [[Star-Lord]]'s team entered the ship. In response, Ronan used the Orb's power to destroy the Nova Corps' ships, killing hundreds of men including Saal. In the end, Ronan was killed and his army was defeated.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Gaining the Orb==== [[File:Irani Rael, Gamora and Star-Lord.png|{{AltFloat}}|Rael speaks to the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]]] {{Quote|On behalf of the [[Nova Corps]], we'd like to express our profound gratitude for your help in [[Battle of Xandar|saving]] [[Xandar]].|Irani Rael to the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} With the [[Battle of Xandar|battle]] won, Rael promoted Corpsman [[Rhomann Dey]] to the rank of Denarian in the wake of [[Garthan Saal]]'s death. She then gathered the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] together and gave [[Star-Lord]] information about his [[Ego|mysterious father]], who, it turned out, was not [[human]] but part of a [[Celestials|strange and ancient race]]. She expressed her gratitude to the Guardians for their role in defending her homeworld. As a result, all of their criminal records were expunged by the [[Nova Corps]]. [[File:Novacorp.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Rael locks away the [[Orb]] in a hidden capsule]] The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] soon left [[Xandar]] on the rebuilt ship, the ''[[Milano]]'', but before they left Quill gave Rael the [[Orb]] to keep it from the wrong hands. Already aware of the incredible dangers such a powerful weapon held, Rael personally ensured that it was locked away deep in a vault within the [[Nova Corps Headquarters]] with security present at all times to ensure its protection from anyone who would use its power for evil.{{Ref|GotG}} {{Clear}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Tactician''': As Nova Prime and commander of the [[Nova Corps]], Irani Rael is at the head of a powerful military force she led during the [[Battle of Xandar]]. She listens to her trusted peers a lot as well, deciding for [[Rhomann Dey]]'s plan to allow the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] back to help. Rael also listened to [[Peter Quill]], who informed her to keep the [[Power Stone]] on [[Xandar]]. However, this led to the [[Destruction of Xandar|destruction]] of the planet. ==Equipment== *'''[[Orb]]''': Following the [[Battle of Xandar]], the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] trusted Rael with the Orb containing the [[Power Stone]] so it could be kept away from malevolent use. To that end, Rael sealed the Orb in a high-security vault in the [[Nova Corps]] headquarters. ==Facilities== *'''[[Nova Corps Headquarters]]''': Rael's headquarters were near the center of the city where her subordinates reported to her. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Nova Corps]] - Subordinates **[[Rhomann Dey]] **[[Garthan Saal]] † **[[Nova Prime's Assistant|Assistant]] **[[Sacrifice Nova Corpsman]] † *[[Kree Empire]] - Former Enemies **[[Kree Emperor]] **[[Kree Ambassador]] - Situational Ally *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] - Former Enemies **[[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] **[[Gamora]] † **[[Drax the Destroyer]] **[[Rocket]] **[[Groot]] *[[Yondu Ravager Clan]] **[[Yondu Udonta]] † **[[Kraglin Obfonteri]] **[[Vorker]] † **[[Horuz]] † {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Ronan the Accuser]] † *[[Sakaarans]] **[[Maskless Sakaaran]] † *[[Thanos]] † {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Irani Rael was a [[w:c:marvel:Rigellians|Rigellian]] Nova Centurion recruited following the destruction of [[Xandar]]. Rael never had the rank of Nova Prime, which was instead originally held by [[Rhomann Dey]] before his death. ==Behind the Scenes== *Although confirmed in interviews to be named Irani Rael, the character is addressed on screen only as "Nova-Prime", and Glenn Close is credited as such on all official materials. *[[James Gunn]] initially announced that [[Glenn Close]] would reprise her role as Irani Rael in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'', however, the character did not appear in the final cut of the film, suggesting that she was later written out.[https://www.facebook.com/jgunn/photos/a.216126946156.142629.48103536156/10153165740966157/?type=3 James Gunn - Official photography on Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 has started, and I couldn't be more stoked.] *[[Dani Biernat]] was a stunt double for [[Glenn Close]] in the role of Irani Rael. ==References== {{Gallery|Irani Rael/Gallery}} {{Wq|Irani Rael}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Nova-Prime}} [[es:Irani Rael]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy (film) Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Xandarians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:White Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Stonekeepers]] [[Category:Nova Corps Leaders]]
